description: Training examples for IBM Fusion cadence generation. Includes both sample examples and empty templates for adding your own.

steps.subject: VMware costs at Goldman Sachs?
steps.body:
Sarah,

Many financial services firms are seeing 3-5x VMware cost increases post-Broadcom. Goldman Sachs' infrastructure scale likely means significant budget impact.

IBM Fusion offers:
• 40-60% lower TCO vs. VMware
• Zero licensing surprises
• Same enterprise reliability you need for trading systems

Worth a 15-minute conversation on what we're seeing in FinServ?

Best,
Bob

Sarah - Following up on my email about VMware cost optimization. Several tier-1 banks have moved to IBM Fusion and are seeing 50%+ savings. Would love to share what's working in financial services. Open to a brief call?

Hi Sarah, Bob from IBM calling about infrastructure cost optimization.

Talking points:
• Broadcom VMware pricing impact on Goldman Sachs
• How tier-1 banks are responding (50-60% cost reduction)
• Fusion's SOX/PCI compliance for financial services
• Quick ROI assessment - 15 minutes

If voicemail: 'Sarah, Bob from IBM. Quick question about your VMware infrastructure costs post-Broadcom. Seeing major savings at similar FinServ firms. Worth 15 minutes? [phone/email]'

examples.notes: Strong industry-specific hooks, quantified value, timely trigger event

steps.subject: Platform engineering at Stripe
steps.body:
Marcus,

Stripe's developer velocity is legendary. But as you scale globally, platform complexity grows exponentially.

IBM Fusion + OpenShift gives you:
• Consistent dev experience across 20+ regions
• 40% faster deployment cycles
• Built-in security for payment processing

Several fintech unicorns are using this stack. 20 minutes to discuss your platform roadmap?

Bob

steps.subject: Re: Platform engineering at Stripe
steps.body:
Marcus,

Quick follow-up - saw Stripe's recent expansion into Asia-Pacific. That's exactly where our platform engineering approach shines.

One fintech customer reduced their multi-region deployment time from 6 weeks to 3 days.

Worth exploring for Stripe's global scale?

Bob

examples.notes: Tech-forward language, specific to company's known initiatives

steps.subject: AI infrastructure for Target's scale
steps.body:
Jennifer,

Target's omnichannel experience is industry-leading. As you explore GenAI for personalization and inventory optimization, infrastructure becomes critical.

IBM Fusion provides:
• Secure AI workload isolation (PCI compliant)
• Scale for peak season (Black Friday ready)
• 60% lower AI infrastructure costs

Major retailers are seeing 3-4 month faster AI deployment. Worth discussing?

Bob

examples.notes: Retail-specific AI use cases, compliance awareness
